title: Security Misconfiguration - Exposed Debug Panel
hint: Developers sometimes forget to disable debug mode.

whyVulnerable.explanation: The application allowed debug mode through a user-controlled parameter.
whyVulnerable.answer: Production systems must never trust client-controlled debug flags.

attackFlow.answer: Changing mode=false to mode=true exposed debug data.

secureFix.explanation: Debug features should depend on server environment variables only.
secureFix.answer: Never expose debug controls to users.
